description_long: This is a vintage-style food truck with a corrugated metal exterior and a boxy, utilitarian shape reminiscent of mid-20th-century European delivery vans. The body is painted a uniform gray, with black text on the side reading 'LIVRAISON DE CROISSANT À DOMICILE', suggesting it specializes in croissant delivery. The truck features rounded wheel arches, a ribbed roof, and a prominent front grille with horizontal slats. The windows are rectangular and slightly tinted, and the wheels are metallic with visible hubcaps. The rear of the truck has double doors, likely for loading and unloading, and the overall design is functional yet charming, evoking a sense of nostalgia.
description: A vintage gray food truck with ribbed metal siding, black signage, and a boxy, utilitarian design. It features rounded wheel arches, a prominent front grille, and rear double doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, black signage, ribbed metal texture, and both front and rear wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the double doors, ribbed paneling, and absence of windows or signage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with identical signage and features visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the large grille, rectangular windshield, and rounded fenders.
attribute_signage: Black text on the side reads 'LIVRAISON DE CROISSANT À DOMICILE' with additional smaller text below.
